top_signals.title: Trump not rushing Iran deal, whacks critics as 'losers'
top_signals.summary: The president said the U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports would remain in effect until "an agreement is reached, certified, and signed."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: West Ham United relegation to cost London taxpayers millions
top_signals.summary: West Ham United’s relegation from the Premier League to the Championship will cost London taxpayers millions with the capital losing a top flight club once again. West Ham United and Tottenham Hotspur went into Sunday’s final round of matches knowing one of them would be relegated and, despite a 3-0 win over Leeds United, it [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
